problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Federated learning without data centralization may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
